examples: And with that I think we are going to bestow the official pardon on — wait, which — is he Gobbler or Cobbler?
And with that I think we are going to bestow the official pardon on — wait, which — is he Gobbler or Cobbler? Cobbler. Come on.
Thanksgiving is a family time. On this holiday, families gather to gobble up (eat up fast ) the gobbler and stuff (fill) themselves with stuffing.
Gobbler, a patient but proud bird, loves to nibble on corn and enjoys any music with a fiddle.
Although Cobbler was selected for the title of National Thanksgiving Turkey, both he and his alternate, Gobbler, received a pardon.
